name: skill-creator (@chindden)
tagline: ClawHub (329★): Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing
verdict: Solid marks: quality B, security A. Weak spots: no stated 'not for' cases to prevent misfiring on adjacent tasks, and it runs a bundled Python script without ever confirming python3 is available -- if it's missing, the flow just breaks with no warning.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
Packaging failure is addressed, but the equally risky init_skill.py step (Step 3) has no stated failure handling.
